executives.name: Lawrence J. Ellison
executives.background: Mr. Ellison has been Oracle’s Chairman of the Board and Chief Technology Officer since September 2014. He served as Oracle’s Chief Executive Officer from June 1977, when he founded Oracle, until September 2014.

tenure_dates.title: Chairman of the Board and Chief Technology Officer

executives.name: Safra A. Catz
executives.background: Ms. Catz has been Oracle’s Chief Executive Officer since September 2014. She served as Oracle’s President from January 2004 to September 2014 and as Oracle’s Chief Financial Officer from 2011 to 2014 and 2005 to 2008.

board_of_directors.name: Lawrence J. Ellison
board_of_directors.background: Founder of Oracle and has served as Chairman of the Board since September 2014.

board_of_directors.name: Jeffrey O. Henley
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Henley has been Vice Chairman of the Board since September 2014. He served as Chairman of the Board from 2004 to 2014 and as Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer from 1991 to 2004.

board_of_directors.name: Safra A. Catz
board_of_directors.background: CEO of Oracle and member of the Board of Directors since 2001.

board_of_directors.name: Jeffrey S. Berg
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of International Creative Management, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Michael J. Boskin
board_of_directors.background: Tully M. Friedman Professor of Economics and Senior Fellow, Hoover Institution, Stanford University.

board_of_directors.name: Bruce R. Chizen
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of Adobe Systems Incorporated.

board_of_directors.name: George H. Conrades
board_of_directors.background: Chairman Emeritus of Akamai Technologies, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Rona A. Fairhead
board_of_directors.background: Former Minister of State for Trade and Export Promotion in the United Kingdom.

board_of_directors.name: Renée J. James
board_of_directors.background: Founder, Chairman and CEO of Ampere Computing and former President of Intel Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Charles W. Moorman
board_of_directors.background: Former Chairman and CEO of Norfolk Southern Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Leon E. Panetta
board_of_directors.background: Former U.S. Secretary of Defense and former Director of the Central Intelligence Agency.

board_of_directors.name: William G. Parrett
board_of_directors.background: Former CEO of Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu.

board_of_directors.name: Naomi O. Seligman
board_of_directors.background: Senior Partner at Oritani Advisors and co-founder of Research Board, Inc.

board_of_directors.name: Vishal Sikka
board_of_directors.background: Founder and CEO of Vianai Systems, Inc. and former CEO of Infosys Limited.
